backingDescription: bC3M tracks the Amundi ETF GOVIES 0-6 Months EUROMTS Investment Grade UCITS ETF. The underlying ETF seeks to replicate the FTSE Eurozone Government Bill 0-6 Month Capped Index, which measures short-term sovereign bonds of certain Eurozone states with 0–6 month maturity.
custodian: Alpaca Securities LLC; InCore Bank AG; Maerki Baumann & Co. AG
redemptionAsset: Cash value of the underlying exposure

_meta.notes: No explicit bC3M proof-of-reserves or reserve breakdown was confirmed from the accessible official product page during this review.
